relationships: ber:Maɣef ay yettɛeḍḍil dima akken ad d-yaweḍ ɣer uɣerbaz﹖
ber:Yessefk dima ad tarmemt akk ayen umi tzemremt
ber:Tom qrib dima yetteddu ɣef uḍar ɣer umahil
ber:Qrib dima tturareɣ takurt n uqecwal mi ara d-ffɣeɣ seg uɣerbaz

ber:Qrib dima ttedduɣ ɣer umahil ɣef uḍar
ber:Tom qrib dima itteg aya deffir yimensi
